title: PROSPER PORTLAND - 211info
text: PROSPER PORTLAND PROSPER PORTLAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers economic development programs that support small business, improve access to workforce training, and create jobs for Portland residents. 220 NW 2nd Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 823-3200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 823-3200 FAX (503) 823-3368 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Business Development Job Development If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
